text: PB - As a User, I want to re-order pages within the same parent/root via Nav - FE UI component
llm_output:
Scenario: Re-order pages within the same parent/root via navigation UI component  
Given I am logged into the application  
And I am on the navigation UI component page  
And I have a parent/root with multiple pages listed under it  
When I drag and drop a page to a new position within the same parent/root  
Then the page is successfully moved to the new position  
And the updated order of pages is displayed immediately in the navigation UI component
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to re-order pages within the same parent/root via Nav - FE UI component
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Reordering Pages and Sub-Pages via Drag-and-Drop in Navigation Panel
Given a user is in editing mode within the Page Builder
When the user drags a page that contains sub-pages to a new position in the Navigation Panel
Then the page, along with all its sub-pages, should move together to the new position
And after the move, the sub-pages should be collapsed under the parent page in the Navigation Panel
And the updated page order and hierarchy should be saved and persist across editing and viewing modes until changed again by the user

text: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
llm_output:
Scenario: User views the new landing page  
Given the user is not logged in  
When the user navigates to the website's homepage  
Then the user sees the new landing page with updated design, branding, and content
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User views a new landing page with empty Sections  
    Given the user is in Page Builder  
    When the user creates a new landing page  
    Then the page should display empty Sections  
    And there should be no Blocks inside the Sections

text: PB - As a User, I want to create a Drag & Drop Page (as a standalone Page) from Nav
llm_output:
Scenario: User creates a Drag & Drop Page from the navigation menu  
Given the user is logged into the application and is on the main dashboard  
When the user clicks on the "Create New Page" option in the navigation menu  
And selects "Drag & Drop Page" from the page type options  
And enters a valid page name in the input field  
And clicks the "Create" button  
Then a new standalone Drag & Drop Page is created  
And the user is redirected to the newly created Drag & Drop Page editor  
And the page name is displayed correctly in the editor header.
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to create a Drag & Drop Page (as a standalone Page) from Nav
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Creating a Drag & Drop Page from Navigation in Page Builder
Given the user is in the Page Builder under ‘All Pages’ or a specific Page Category
When they want to create a Drag & Drop Page
Then they should see the creation button at the bottom of the Nav Panel
And Given the user clicks the creation button
Then they should be able to start creating a Drag & Drop Page
And Given the user is interacting with a standalone or parent page
When they click the kebab menu icon (⋮) and select the ‘Page’ action
Then they should also be able to create a Drag & Drop Page

text: PB - As a User, I want to only select & see the combo of Widget and Block (bounding box experience) in Page Builder
llm_output:
Scenario: User selects and views a combo of Widget and Block in Page Builder  
Given the user is logged into the Page Builder application  
And the user is on the Page Builder interface  
And the interface displays available Widgets and Blocks  
When the user selects a specific Widget and Block combo  
Then only the selected Widget and Block combo is highlighted and displayed in a bounding box  
And the rest of the interface remains unchanged
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to only select & see the combo of Widget and Block (bounding box experience) in Page Builder
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User selects a Widget and Block as a whole in Page Builder
    Given the user is in Create/Edit mode in Page Builder
    And the user has added a Widget inside a Block
    When the user selects the Widget
    Then the entire bounding box of the Widget and Block should be highlighted
    And the selection experience should match the previous Block bounding box behavior
    And the user should only be able to navigate up to the Section

text: As a User, I want to access Reply action for New Replies in Daily Digest Email
llm_output:
Scenario: Access Reply Action for New Replies in Daily Digest Email  
Given the user has received the Daily Digest Email with new replies  
When the user clicks on the "Reply" action link for a specific reply in the email  
Then the user is redirected to the reply interface for that specific reply in the application
User Story: As a User, I want to access Reply action for New Replies in Daily Digest Email
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User can access and reply to new comments from the Daily Digest Email  
    Given the user receives a Daily Digest Email with new replies  
    When the user clicks on the "Reply" action as per the design  
    Then the user should be redirected to the Reply page in a new tab  
    And the applicable comment should be highlighted and ready to reply to  
    And the text box should be active and ready for the user to type a response

text: As a user I want to see 'Bulk Review' in bulk review page header (page name)
llm_output:
Scenario: Display 'Bulk Review' in the bulk review page header  
Given the user is on the bulk review page  
When the page loads successfully  
Then the header should display the text 'Bulk Review'
User Story: As a user I want to see 'Bulk Review' in bulk review page header (page name)
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Show correct page name in Bulk Review header  
    Given the user navigates to the Bulk Review page  
    When the page loads  
    Then the page header should display the title "Bulk Review"

text: As a user, I want to be able to see the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Markup Screen in Approvals so that I can markup the animation to get feedback and new revisions worked on
llm_output:
Scenario: View converted MP4 on Markup Screen for feedback  
Given the user has uploaded a GIF or Lottie File  
And the file has been successfully converted to MP4  
And the user is on the Approvals Markup Screen  
When the user selects the converted MP4 file  
Then the MP4 file is displayed on the Markup Screen  
And the user can interact with markup tools to provide feedback.
User Story: As a user, I want to be able to see the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Markup Screen in Approvals so that I can markup the animation to get feedback and new revisions worked on
Manual Scenario:
Scenario:  Verify the GIF and Lottie file preview on Version/Revision screen
  Given I am an admin 
  When I upload Lottie and GIF file
  And navigate to the Version/Revision screen
  Then The file should have been converted to MP4
  And The controls should be hidden
  And The MP4 should autoplay

text: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
llm_output:
Scenario: User views the new landing page  
Given the user is not logged in  
When the user navigates to the website's homepage  
Then the user sees the new landing page with updated design, branding, and content
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to see a new landing page
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Viewing Empty Sections Without Blocks
Given the user is in Page Builder
And the Page is in Create or Edit mode
When the user adds a new Section
Then the Section should be visible as an empty container
And it should not contain any Blocks by default
And the user should have the option to drag Widgets into the empty Section

text: As a User, I want to open current location for single / same folder Move
llm_output:
Scenario: Open current location for moving a single folder  
Given the user is logged into the system and is on the file management interface  
And the user has selected a single folder to move  
When the user initiates the move action  
Then the current location of the selected folder is displayed to the user
User Story: As a User, I want to open current location for single / same folder Move
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Loading the Correct Folder Location in V3 Folder Tree When Moving Resources
Given the user is moving a resource
When the user moves a single resource
Then the current location should be loaded as opened in the V3 folder tree branch
And if the user lacks permission to items earlier in that tree, the top-level view should open instead
When the user performs a bulk move of resources from the same folder
Then the current location should be loaded as opened in the V3 folder tree branch

text: As an Internal User, I want to have MCP(development use only) settings to enable/disable features per Epic for Drag & Drop Page MVP
llm_output:
Scenario: Enable a feature for Drag & Drop Page MVP using MCP settings  
Given I am an Internal User with access to the MCP settings  
And the MCP settings page is accessible  
And the feature toggle for the specific Epic is available in the MCP settings  
When I enable the feature toggle for the Epic in the MCP settings  
Then the feature for the Drag & Drop Page MVP associated with the Epic is enabled  
And the changes are saved successfully in the MCP settings
User Story: As an Internal User, I want to have MCP(development use only) settings to enable/disable features per Epic for Drag & Drop Page MVP
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Internal User configures MCP settings for Drag & Drop Page features  
    Given the user is in the Development Use section of MCP settings  
    When the user views the Platform Settings  
    Then the following MCP settings should be available under "Development Use only" for the Drag & Drop Page MVP:  
      | Setting Name                                       | Description                                  |  
      | "Drag & Drop Pages: Widgets combining Block"       | Enables/Disables widgets combining block feature |  
      | "Drag & Drop Pages: Image Resizing"                 | Enables/Disables image resizing feature         |  
      | "Drag & Drop Pages: Page Templates"                 | Enables/Disables page templates feature         |  
      | "Drag & Drop Pages - Page Category"                 | Enables/Disables page category feature          |  

    When the user enables or disables any of the above settings  
    Then the relevant features should be activated or deactivated based on the settings chosen

text: As a User, I want Surface Question/Answer/Rating back end data in weekly report / script
llm_output:
Scenario: Generate a weekly report with Question/Answer/Rating data  
Given the backend system has stored Question/Answer/Rating data  
And the user has access to the reporting tool  
When the user requests the weekly report  
Then the system generates a report containing the Question/Answer/Rating data for the past week  
And the report is formatted and delivered to the user successfully.
User Story: As a User, I want Surface Question/Answer/Rating back end data in weekly report / script
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Update Weekly Report Name and Remove Dev Server Reports
Given the system generates the weekly_closed_captions_activation_report
When the report is updated
Then the report name should be changed to weekly_asset_intelligence_report
And any entries related to the following Dev Server reports should be removed:
dcfprod
rtsprod
dev018
dev015
dpctest
dcftest
dev016
dev003
dev027
dev026
rtstest
macsprod

text: As a User, I want to switch Page Categories when viewing a Page if there are multiple Page Categories
llm_output:
Scenario: Switching Page Categories when viewing a Page  
Given I am viewing a Page with multiple Page Categories  
When I select a different Page Category from the category menu  
Then the content of the Page updates to display information relevant to the selected Page Category
User Story: As a User, I want to switch Page Categories when viewing a Page if there are multiple Page Categories
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User can switch Page Categories via the dropdown  
    Given the user is viewing a Page  
    And multiple Page Categories exist  
    And the user has permission to view pages under these categories  
    When the user opens the Page Category dropdown in the navigation  
    Then the available Page Categories, including "All Pages," should be displayed  
    When the user selects a different Page Category from the dropdown  
    Then the Pages under the selected category should be loaded in the navigation panel

text: PB - As a User, I want to add Widgets directly to a Section
llm_output:
Scenario: Adding a Widget to a Section  
Given I am logged into the application  
And I am on the page displaying available Sections  
And a Section is visible and selectable  
And a list of available Widgets is displayed  
When I select a Widget from the list  
And I drag and drop the Widget into the desired Section  
Then the Widget is added to the Section  
And the Section displays the newly added Widget
User Story: PB - As a User, I want to add Widgets directly to a Section
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Dragging Widgets from Navigation Panel to a Section in Page Builder
Given the user is in Create or Edit mode in Page Builder
And the Navigation Panel is open
When the user drags a Widget from the Navigation Panel to a Section
Then the Widget should be added to the selected Section successfully

text: BP - As a User, I want to single select resources from Resource Lookup with unchangeable filter based on file type in Page Builder
llm_output:
Scenario: Single select a resource from Resource Lookup with a fixed file type filter  
Given I am on the Page Builder interface  
And the Resource Lookup is displayed with a fixed filter for a specific file type  
When I select a resource from the list  
Then the selected resource is highlighted  
And only one resource is selected  
And the selection respects the unchangeable file type filter
User Story: BP - As a User, I want to single select resources from Resource Lookup with unchangeable filter based on file type in Page Builder
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User selects a resource with a locked file type filter in Page Builder  
    Given the user opens the Resource Lookup in Page Builder  
    When the user views the filtering options  
    Then the "File Format" filter should be locked  
    And it should only allow selecting "Image" file types  
    And the filtered results should be displayed by default based on the target page area  
    When the user selects an image resource  
    Then it should be added to the designated area in Page Builder

text: As a user I want to run a stats report for database tool and see files from multi upload field represented each on their own row (excluding in Duplicable sections)
llm_output:
Scenario: Generate stats report with files from multi-upload field represented on separate rows  
Given the user has access to the database tool  
And the user has uploaded multiple files in the multi-upload field  
And the files are not part of any Duplicable sections  
When the user runs the stats report  
Then the report should display each file from the multi-upload field on its own row  
And no files from Duplicable sections should be included in the report.
User Story: As a user I want to run a stats report for database tool and see files from multi upload field represented each on their own row (excluding in Duplicable sections)
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Display Multiple Files in Separate Rows for a Multi-Upload Field
Given a Multi-Upload field contains multiple files
When the user views the uploaded files
Then each file should be represented on its own row
And the file names should be expanded into separate rows for clear visibility

text: As a user, I want to be able to preview the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Review Request screen in Approvals so that I can preview what the animation is when approving
llm_output:
Scenario: Preview converted MP4 animation on Review Request screen  
Given the user is on the Review Request screen in Approvals  
And the Review Request contains a converted MP4 file from a GIF or Lottie File  
When the user clicks on the preview button for the MP4 file  
Then the MP4 animation should play in a preview window  
And the user should be able to view the animation without downloading the file.
User Story: As a user, I want to be able to preview the GIF or Lottie File converted MP4 on the Review Request screen in Approvals so that I can preview what the animation is when approving
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Verify the GIF and Lottie file preview on the edit screen
  Given I am an admin 
  When I upload Lottie and GIF file
  And I click on edit/new version 
  Then The file should have converted to MP4
  And The controls should be hidden
  And The MP4 should autoplay

text: As a user, I want to see the database name and record name in the header
llm_output:
Scenario: Display database name and record name in the header  
Given the user is logged into the application  
And the user has selected a database  
And the user has opened a specific record within the database  
When the user views the header of the application  
Then the header should display the name of the selected database  
And the header should display the name of the opened record
User Story: As a user, I want to see the database name and record name in the header
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Update Overlay Component to Use ib-ui Overlay and Display Database & Record Information
Given the user is viewing a record in an overlay
When the ib-ui Overlay component is used
Then the typography and button styles should be updated according to the new design
And the overlay header should display the database name
And the database name should be clickable
And the overlay header should display the record name
And if the database name or record name is too long, it should be truncated with a tooltip displaying the full value

text: PB - (Misc) As a User, I want to be informed why the Page cannot be saved in Page Builder if it's beyond the set Page limit in MCP
llm_output:
Scenario: Display error message when Page exceeds set Page limit in MCP  
Given the user is editing a Page in Page Builder  
And the set Page limit in MCP has been exceeded  
When the user attempts to save the Page  
Then an error message is displayed stating "The Page cannot be saved because it exceeds the set Page limit in MCP"  
And the Page is not saved.
User Story: PB - (Misc) As a User, I want to be informed why the Page cannot be saved in Page Builder if it's beyond the set Page limit in MCP
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: Display Warning Snackbar When D&D Page Limit is Reached in Page Builder
Given the user is in Page Builder
And the Drag & Drop (D&D) page limit set in MCP has been reached
When the user clicks on the "Save" button in the top bar
Then a warning snackbar should be displayed with the message:
“Page limit of {&number set as page limit in MCP} reached.”

text: As a User, I want to configure both Block and Video Widget properties
llm_output:
Scenario: Configure properties for Block and Video Widgets  
Given the user is logged into the application and is on the widget configuration page  
When the user selects a Block Widget and updates its properties (e.g., title, background color)  
And the user selects a Video Widget and updates its properties (e.g., video URL, autoplay setting)  
Then the updated properties for the Block Widget should be saved and displayed correctly  
And the updated properties for the Video Widget should be saved and displayed correctly
User Story: As a User, I want to configure both Block and Video Widget properties
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: User configures settings for Block and Video Widgets  
    Given the user is in the Page Builder  
    When the user selects a Block Widget or a Video Widget  
    Then the widget settings panel should open in the navigation panel  
    And the settings should include previously defined Block and Video Widget properties  
    When the user modifies any settings in the panel  
    Then the changes should be applied to the selected widget in real time  
    And the settings should persist when the page is saved

text: As a Database Manager, I want to allow end users to Add More child records ('Add More') - Handle maximum child records
llm_output:
Scenario: Adding child records up to the maximum allowed limit  
Given the user is logged into the system as a Database Manager  
And the user is on the "Add More Child Records" page  
And the system allows a maximum of 10 child records per parent record  
And the parent record has fewer than 10 child records currently associated  
When the user clicks the "Add More" button  
And the user fills in the required details for a new child record  
And the user clicks the "Save" button  
Then the new child record is successfully added to the parent record  
And the total number of child records for the parent record is updated  
And a confirmation message "Child record added successfully" is displayed.
User Story: As a Database Manager, I want to allow end users to Add More child records ('Add More') - Handle maximum child records
Manual Scenario:
Scenario: 'Allow User to Add More' setting with 30 records
      Given I am in the Configure Auto-Created Records overlay
      When I add 30 records 
      And 1 of those records has 'Allow User to skip…’ enabled
      Then I can enable 'Allow User to Add More'
      When I disable 'Allow User to skip…’ on the last record
      Then 'Allow User to Add More' is disabled
      And if I hover over the setting I see the text 'The max 30 {{Records}} has been added here. Remove any of the above to allow users to add more.'
